grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive franchise to use BK System and Marks at specified location only
grant_and_term.term: Set on Key Contract Data page (typically 20 years)
grant_and_term.territory: None. 'This franchise is for the specified location only and does not in any way grant or imply any area, market or territorial rights proprietary to Franchisee.'
grant_and_term.renewal: 'Franchisee accepts this franchise with the full and complete understanding that the franchise grant contains no promise or assurance of renewal.'

fee_and_payment_obligations.royalty: 4.5% of monthly Gross Sales, due 10th of next month
fee_and_payment_obligations.advertising_contribution: Up to 4.5% of Gross Sales, same schedule
fee_and_payment_obligations.gross_sales_definition: All sums charged for goods, merchandise or services sold at or from the Restaurant, including premiums, excluding sales taxes
fee_and_payment_obligations.late_charge: Maximum rate allowed by FL law or 18% per annum
fee_and_payment_obligations.payment_method: Direct monthly withdrawal from bank account or electronic payment
fee_and_payment_obligations.investment_spending: Up to 2% of Gross Sales if DMA majority clause applies (66.7% threshold)
fee_and_payment_obligations.audit_right: BKC may audit; if understatement >2%, franchisee pays audit cost
fee_and_payment_obligations.advertising_fund_audit: Franchisee Association may audit once annually; BKC pays if misappropriation or >3% discrepancy

site_selection_and_construction.site_selection: Franchisee finds site within Target Area designated by BKC; BKC approves
site_selection_and_construction.construction: Must construct per BKC-approved plans and specs; all costs borne by franchisee
site_selection_and_construction.property_control: BKC does not help negotiate lease; franchisee must obtain all permits
site_selection_and_construction.ada_compliance: Architect certification of ADA compliance required

training_and_operational.pre_opening_training: Up to 20 hours classroom + 320 hours in-restaurant; $7,500/trainee
training_and_operational.hours_of_operation: Minimum 6AM-12AM Mon-Sat, 7AM-12AM Sun, 52 weeks/year (Thanksgiving/Christmas optional if majority of competitors closed)
training_and_operational.food_safety_incident_reporting: Written notice to BKC within 24 hours of any investigation, violation, failing score, closure or critical violation
training_and_operational.menu_compliance: Only approved items; all specs per MOD Manual

curable_180_days: failure to meet minimum financial criteria

transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: BKC and designee have ROFR on same terms as third-party offer
transfer_restrictions.void_transfers: Any transfer without ROFR offer is void and of no force
transfer_restrictions.crown_your_career_restriction: Transfer may be withheld for any reason during first 5 years

default_and_cross_default.cross_default_scope: Default under any BK franchise agreement, lease, Crown Your Career agreement, Carrols Refranchise agreement, Reclaim the Flame agreement, or any other BKC agreement constitutes default under all agreements
default_and_cross_default.fss_grade_default_da: Receiving 'F' grade in any FSS metric

noncompete.during_term: No ownership, operation, or interest in any other hamburger business
noncompete.post_term: 1 year within 2 miles of restaurant, no hamburger business
noncompete.ai_restriction: May not use trade secrets for ML, AI training, or generative AI input without prior approval
noncompete.contract_feeder_exception: Corporate Addendum Contract Feeders may operate competing fast-food under limited conditions

guaranty_scope.individual_fa: Individuals personally liable; Operating Partner must retain 50% equity
guaranty_scope.entity_fa: Managing Owner + other Owners sign personal guaranty. Guaranty is joint and several, waives all defenses and notices.
guaranty_scope.llc_assignment: If assigned to LLC, individuals retain personal liability
guaranty_scope.crown_your_career: Spouse/partner must sign personal guarantee of all obligations

liquidated_damages.post_termination_royalty: Royalties and advertising contributions for remainder of term on termination
liquidated_damages.bkl_default: Full rent and charges for balance of lease term
liquidated_damages.da_brand_damage_fee: Remaining prepaid franchise fees if DA terminated before expiration
liquidated_damages.deferred_remodel_default: Royalty increases to 6.0% or 7.5% until remodel completed

venue_and_dispute_resolution.forum: U.S. District Court S.D. Florida or 11th Judicial Court, Miami-Dade County
venue_and_dispute_resolution.mediation: Mandatory non-binding for development disputes only
venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: None mandatory; voluntary for development disputes at franchisee election
venue_and_dispute_resolution.jury_waiver: Yes (Crown Your Career Security Agreement, Promissory Note)

insurance_requirements.cgl: $2M per occurrence; aggregate varies by portfolio size (1-10: $2M, 11-50: $5M, 51+: $10M)

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify and reimburse BKC for all costs, judgments, losses from third-party claims relating to restaurant operation, including misappropriation claims under Services Agreement
indemnification.enforcement_costs: Must reimburse BKC for costs of enforcing agreements if franchisee defaults or sues (unless franchisee found compliant)

force_majeure.explicit_provision: Not identified as separate clause in FA
force_majeure.government_restrictions: Item 1 notes state/federal regulations allow government to restrict travel and/or require business closure during emergencies

distinctive_clauses.data_ownership: BKC is sole owner of all data generated by Additional Digital Systems. BKC may provide data to third parties and retain all net profits from data monetization.
distinctive_clauses.ai_trade_secret_restriction: May not use trade secrets for ML, AI model training, or input into generative AI platforms without prior approval. Must opt out of allowing any AI provider to use trade secrets.
distinctive_clauses.successor_4_year_notice: Must give written notice of intent to seek successor FA during the 4th year prior to expiration
distinctive_clauses.successor_general_release: Execution of general release of BKC in satisfactory form required for successor FA
distinctive_clauses.successor_current_image: Must remodel to current image 3 months to 3 years before Term expiration
distinctive_clauses.value_menu_price_cap: BKC can set maximum prices on Value Menu items
distinctive_clauses.delivery_waiver: Delivery Restaurant franchisees waive all rights to dispute development of another restaurant
